description: Browse Properties link only shows for unauthenticated users and regular users
steps: Open Navbar.tsx and verify 'Browse Properties' link is wrapped in (!role || role === 'user') conditional
Open MobileMenu.tsx and verify same conditional wrapping for 'Browse Properties'
Verify company role does NOT see Browse Properties in navbar or mobile menu
Verify contractor role does NOT see Browse Properties in navbar or mobile menu

description: Company navbar shows Find Contractors link pointing to /company/contractors
steps: Open Navbar.tsx and verify company role block includes Link to /company/contractors
Verify the link text uses t('nav.findContractors') i18n key
Open MobileMenu.tsx and verify company block includes Find Contractors NavLink to /company/contractors

description: CompanySidebar includes Find Contractors link with Users icon
steps: Open CompanySidebar.tsx and verify links array includes /company/contractors entry
Verify the link label uses t('nav.findContractors')
Verify the icon is Users from lucide-react
Verify it is positioned between Buildings and Properties entries

description: Contractor navbar shows Browse Projects and My Projects links
steps: Open Navbar.tsx and verify contractor role block includes Link to /contractor/browse with t('nav.browseProjects')
Verify contractor role block includes Link to /contractor/projects with t('nav.myProjects')
Open MobileMenu.tsx and verify contractor block includes Browse Projects NavLink to /contractor/browse
Verify contractor block includes My Projects NavLink to /contractor/projects

description: ContractorSidebar includes Browse Projects link with Search icon and My Projects renamed
steps: Open ContractorSidebar.tsx and verify links array includes /contractor/browse entry with t('nav.browseProjects')
Verify Browse Projects uses Search icon from lucide-react
Verify the existing projects link now uses t('nav.myProjects') instead of t('nav.projects')
